title: Luscious Saudi Vermicelli Casserole
description: A resinous and juicy casserole that blends fragrant vermicelli with saffron milk, yogurt, and toasted nuts for a crowd‑pleasing Saudi‑Arabian comfort dish.

ingredients.name: plain yogurt
ingredients.notes: coconut yogurt can be used for a dairy‑free version

instructions: Heat the ghee in a skillet over medium heat and lightly toast the vermicelli until golden brown.
Add cardamom pods, raisins, almonds, and dried apricots to the skillet, sautéing for two minutes to release aromas.
Transfer the toasted mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and spread evenly.
In a bowl whisk together milk, saffron, sugar, lemon zest, yogurt, and salt until smooth.
Pour the warm milk mixture over the vermicelli, stirring gently to coat each strand.
Cover the dish with foil and bake at 180°C for 20 minutes, or until the milk is absorbed and the top is lightly golden.
Remove the foil, increase the temperature to 200°C, and bake for an additional 5 minutes to crisp the surface.
Let the casserole rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, optionally garnishing with extra toasted nuts for added crunch.
